title: The Harmony of Crimson and Blue

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I ran into Verxina and the others while they were having a dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …Splendid. It was a very glamorous—captivating dance.

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: Thank you. But—I'm a bit unsure. I feel like I want to incorporate a more special performance—a new choreography.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: New choreography—?

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: Yes. …I want to show a presence that won't be overshadowed by "her" at our upcoming live performance.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: —Oh my, how admirable.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: Please, polish your skills to your heart's content. Do equip yourself with the "allure" needed to steal everyone's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: Only then will I—feel truly inspired to dominate the stage.

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: …Ngh…!

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: Phew…! Haah… Haah…!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …Verxina. I think you might be pushing yourself a bit too hard—

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: …I know. But… It's still not enough…!

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: I have to stand my ground against Gentildonna—I need to master a magnificent dance befitting a queen…!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: ……Verxina. Um… May I say something?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: If—I were to compare you to a flower.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: —A deep, beautiful blue like the surface of the water. Unwavering "love" and "beauty". And a blue rose, which symbolizes the "fulfillment of dreams".

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: I'm—that kind of flower?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …I'm sorry for speaking out of turn. But… I thought my knowledge of flower arrangement might—be of some use to you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: For example—blue flowers represent dignity and tranquility. They are said to be elements that give off a calming impression.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: If you were to intertwine those elements with your charm and express them—perhaps, it would translate into an elegant and relaxed dance.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Yes—exactly like a dignified queen.

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: ……Bouquet. Could you elaborate a little more on that?

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: …Flowers, huh. What an interesting approach. However—

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: Do you really have the confidence to bloom so magnificently that you overshadow me on stage?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …It's true, you are beautiful, Gentildonna. And you have such a tremendous presence.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: But… Because you are here, I think it's possible—to make Verxina shine even more beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you saying you plan to use me as a foil?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …No. Your sheer presence will… Enhance each other's beauty.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: If I were to compare you to a flower. A noble, red rose with a burning intensity hidden inside.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: On the other hand, Verxina is—a flower that gives off a sense of calm dignity. While equal in elegance, your colors are completely contrasting.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: And—by arranging elements of contrasting beauty together, their individual brilliance stands out even more.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Dancing to the same song—one moves
splendidly and boldly. The other dances fluidly and elegantly.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: That will create—a beauty much like a "bouquet", something that could never be achieved individually.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: —My. You're usually so reserved, yet you speak with such conviction.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …This is the one thing I can—truly believe in from the bottom of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: When everyone's individual brilliance finds "harmony". There is no beauty more "special" than that.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: —Very well.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: A red rose and a blue rose. What kind of bouquet will you create by bundling the two together—I shall leave it in your capable hands this time.

text_block_list.name: Verxina
text_block_list.text: …Gentildonna—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so—the dance they perfected with Curren Bouquetd'or's help was met with roaring applause at the actual live performance.
